brief.bottom_line: Two issue slots are restating the same debate.

issues.issue_question: Will softer growth change near-term Fed expectations?

prevailing.text: Softer growth is raising later-cut expectations.

issues.issue_question: Will softer growth change near-term Fed expectations?

prevailing.text: Growth cooling is shifting rate expectations.
prevailing.why_it_matters: The same debate is being repeated.
